narrative:
Grand Rapids Twp Park (precinct in Wood County) has 459 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.9 percentage points.
